title: FeedbackAction
description: Schema for feedback actions in the BenchCore human review/UI benchmark. Records human reviewer decisions on suggestion cards.

action_id.description: Unique identifier for this feedback action.

card_id.description: Reference to the suggestion card this action applies to.

action.description: The reviewer's decision. 'modify' indicates the reviewer provided a modified value.

modified_content.description: The reviewer's modified content. Must be non-null when action is 'modify'; should be null for 'accept' or 'reject'.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the feedback action was recorded.
